name: CarHop Auto Sales of St. Cloud
notes: Site runs on Dealer Inspire (WordPress-based, confirmed by robots.txt wp-admin/wp-content disallows and Cloudflare error referencing retail.websites.dealerinspire.com). Direct HTTP access blocked by Cloudflare. Search results show Yelp listing marked CLOSED (April 2026) and the /used-vehicles/ page title reads '0 Used Cars, Trucks, SUVs in Stock in St. Cloud'. Location appears permanently closed; customers redirected to CarHop Blaine or Crystal locations per their website.
